title: 西施
author: 罗隐
content:
家国兴亡自有时
吴人何苦怨西施
西施若解倾吴国
越国亡来又是谁
translation:
The rise and fall of kingdoms has its own timing
Why do the people of Wu blame Xi Shi?
If Xi Shi could topple the Kingdom of Wu
Then who destroyed the Kingdom of Yue?
annotation: Everyone blames Xi Shi for Wu's fall. Luo Yin asks: if she was so powerful, why did Yue fall too? Don't blame women for men's failures.

title: 题菊花
author: 黄巢
content:
飒飒西风满院栽
蕊寒香冷蝶难来
他年我若为青帝
报与桃花一处开
translation:
Rustling, rustling, west wind, planted all through the courtyard
Petals cold, fragrance cold, butterflies hardly come
If someday I become the Green Emperor
I'll let them bloom together with the peach blossoms
annotation: Chrysanthemums bloom in cold autumn when no one appreciates them. Huang Chao's fantasy: if I were god, I'd let them bloom in spring with the peach blossoms. It's a revolution against the natural order.

title: 台城
author: 韦庄
content:
江雨霏霏江草齐
六朝如梦鸟空啼
无情最是台城柳
依旧烟笼十里堤
translation:
River rain, dense and fine, river grass even
The six dynasties like a dream, birds sing in vain
The most heartless are the willows of the Terrace City
Still mist-shrouding the ten-mile embankment
annotation: Six dynasties rose and fell. The willows don't care — they just keep growing. Wei庄's most famous line: nature's indifference to human history.

title: 金陵图
author: 韦庄
content:
谁谓伤心画不成
画人心逐世人情
君看六幅南朝事
老木寒云满故城
translation:
Who says sorrow can't be painted?
The painter's heart follows the world's mood
Look at the six panels of the Southern Dynasties
Old trees, cold clouds, filling the old city
annotation: Can you paint sadness? Wei庄 says yes: old trees, cold clouds, a ruined city. The painting is the sorrow.

title: 送日本国僧敬龙归
titlePinyin: Song Ri Ben Guo Seng Jing Long Gui
titleEn: Seeing Off Monk Jinglong to Japan
author: 韦庄
content:
扶桑已在渺茫中
家在扶桑东更东
此去与师谁共到
一船明月一帆风
translation:
Fusang is already in the distance
Home is even further east of Fusang
On this journey, who accompanies the master?
One boat of moonlight, one sail of wind
annotation: A Japanese monk goes home — further east than east. Only moonlight and wind will accompany him. Wei庄 makes the journey feel both vast and intimate.

title: 秦妇吟
author: 韦庄
content:
中和癸卯春三月
洛阳城外花如雪
东西南北路人绝
绿杨悄悄香尘灭
路旁忽见如花人
独向绿杨阴下歇
凤侧鸾欹鬓脚斜
红攒黛敛眉心折
借问女郎何处来
含颦欲语声先咽
translation:
Third month of spring, the year of Guimao
Outside Luoyang, flowers like snow
East, west, north, south — no travelers on the road
Green willows silent, fragrant dust extinguished
By the road, suddenly a flower-like person
Alone resting beneath the green willow's shade
Phoenix tilted, phoenix slanted, temples askew
Red gathered, brows knotted, heart broken
I ask: where do you come from?
Frowning, about to speak, voice chokes first
annotation: The longest narrative poem in Tang literature. A woman tells her story of surviving the Huang Chao rebellion. Wei庄 gives voice to the voiceless.

title: 古离别
author: 韦庄
content:
晴烟漠漠柳毵毵
不那离情酒半酣
更把玉鞭云外指
断肠春色在江南
translation:
Clear mist, vast and fine, willows drooping
Can't bear the parting feelings, wine half-finished
He points his jade whip beyond the clouds
Heartbreaking spring colors are in Jiangnan
annotation: Mist, willows, half-finished wine. He points south: the most beautiful spring is where you're going without me. The cruelest farewell: sending someone to paradise alone.

title: 忆昔
author: 韦庄
content:
昔年曾向五陵游
子夜歌清月满楼
银烛树前长似昼
露桃花里不知秋
西园公子名无忌
南国佳人号莫愁
今日乱离俱是梦
夕阳唯见水东流
translation:
In years past, I wandered the Five Tombs
Midnight songs clear, moon filling the tower
Silver candle trees, always like day
Dew peach blossoms, not knowing autumn
The western garden prince was called Wu Ji
The southern kingdom beauty was called Mo Chou
Today, chaos and separation are all dreams
Only the setting sun sees the water flowing east
annotation: The good old days: music, wine, beautiful people. Now it's all a dream. Only the river still flows. Wei庄's nostalgia is for an entire era.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 韦庄
content:
人人尽说江南好
游人只合江南老
春水碧于天
画船听雨眠
垆边人似月
皓腕凝霜雪
未老莫还乡
还乡须断肠
translation:
Everyone says Jiangnan is beautiful
Travelers should grow old in Jiangnan
Spring water bluer than the sky
In a painted boat, listening to rain, sleeping
By the wine jar, a person like the moon
White wrists like congealed frost and snow
Don't return home while still young
Returning home would break your heart
annotation: Jiangnan is so beautiful you should never leave. But that's exactly why you can't go home — home would hurt too much after this. Wei庄's most bittersweet poem.

title: 女冠子
author: 韦庄
content:
四月十七
正是去年今日
别君时
忍泪佯低面
含羞半敛眉
不知魂已断
空有梦相随
除却天边月
没人知
translation:
The seventeenth of fourth month
Exactly a year ago today
When I left you
Holding back tears, pretending to lower my face
Bashful, half-knitting my brows
I didn't know my soul was already broken
Only dreams follow in vain
Except for the moon at the edge of the sky
No one knows
annotation: A year since they parted. She still dreams of him. Only the moon knows. Wei庄 writes a woman's heart with devastating simplicity.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 韦庄
content:
夜夜相思更漏残
伤心明月凭阑干
想君思我锦衾寒
咫尺画堂深似海
忆来惟把旧书看
几时携手入长安
translation:
Night after night, longing, the water clock runs out
Heartbroken, bright moon, leaning on the railing
Thinking of you, missing me, the brocade quilt is cold
The painted hall, so close, deep as the sea
Remembering, I only read old letters
When will we walk hand in hand into Chang'an?
annotation: She reads old letters. The moon is bright, the quilt is cold. 'When will we walk together?' — the question that has no answer.

title: 应天长
author: 韦庄
content:
绿槐阴里黄莺语
深院无人春昼午
画帘垂
金凤舞
寂寞绣屏香一炷
碧天云无定处
空有梦魂来去
夜夜绿窗风雨
断肠君信否
translation:
Green locust trees' shade, yellow orioles sing
Deep courtyard, no one, spring day at noon
Painted curtains hang
Golden phoenixes dance
Lonely embroidered screen, one stick of incense
Blue sky clouds, no fixed place
Only dream souls come and go
Night after night, green window, wind and rain
Heartbroken — do you believe it?
annotation: A woman alone in a deep courtyard. Birds sing, curtains hang, incense burns. 'Heartbroken — do you believe it?' She's asking if he knows how much she suffers.

title: 荷叶杯
author: 韦庄
content:
绝代佳人难得
倾国
花下见无期
一双愁黛远山眉
不忍更思伊
闲掩翠屏金凤
残梦
罗幕画堂空
碧天无路信难通
惆怅旧房栊
translation:
A peerless beauty, hard to find
City-toppling, kingdom-toppling
Under the flowers, no meeting in sight
A pair of sorrowful brows like distant mountains
I can't bear to think of her more
Idly closing the golden phoenix screen
Broken dream
Silk curtains, painted hall, empty
Blue sky, no road, letters hard to send
Melancholy, the old room
annotation: A beauty he can't reach. The screen is closed, the hall is empty, the sky has no road.韦庄 writes longing as physical distance.

title: 清平乐
author: 韦庄
content:
春愁南陌
故国音书隔
细雨霏霏梨花白
燕拂画帘金额
尽日相望王孙
尘满衣上泪痕
谁向桥边吹笛
驻马西望销魂
translation:
Spring sorrow on the southern road
Homeland letters cut off
Fine rain, dense and fine, pear blossoms white
Swallows brush the painted curtain, gold trim
All day watching for the nobleman
Dust covers clothes, tear stains
Who plays the flute by the bridge?
Halted horse, looking west, soul destroyed
annotation: Spring, rain, pear blossoms — and no letters from home. Someone plays a flute by the bridge. The traveler stops his horse and looks west, toward everything he's lost.

title: 谒金门
author: 韦庄
content:
春雨足
染就一溪新绿
柳外飞来双羽玉
弄晴相对浴
楼外翠帘高轴
倚遍阑干几曲
云淡水平烟树簇
寸心千里目
translation:
Spring rain enough
Dyeing the whole stream new green
Beyond the willows, a pair of jade feathers fly
Playing in the clear sky, bathing opposite each other
Beyond the tower, green curtains high-rolled
Leaning on every curve of the railing
Clouds light, water level, misty trees clustered
An inch of heart, a thousand-mile gaze
annotation: Spring rain turns the stream green. Two birds bathe in the sunlight. She leans on the railing, looking as far as her heart can reach — a thousand miles, but only an inch of heart.

title: 天仙子
author: 韦庄
content:
深夜归来长酩酊
扶入流苏犹未醒
醺醺酒气麝兰和
惊睡觉
笑呵呵
长道人生能几何
translation:
Late at night he returns, completely drunk
Supported into the silk hangings, still not sober
Wine fumes mixed with musk and orchid
Startled awake
Laughing ha-ha
He keeps saying: how long can a person live?
annotation: A drunk man stumbles home, still laughing. 'How long can a person live?' — the question that justifies every drink.韦庄 captures the philosophy of the bottle.

title: 酒泉子
author: 韦庄
content:
月落星沉
楼上美人春睡稳
绿云倾
金枕腻
画屏深
translation:
Moon sets, stars sink
Upstairs, the beauty sleeps soundly in spring
Green clouds (hair) tilted
Golden pillow, smooth
Painted screen, deep
annotation: Moon sets, stars fade, a woman sleeps. Her hair spills across the pillow. The screen is deep.韦庄 paints a sleeping beauty with the lightest touch.

title: 定西番
author: 韦庄
content:
芳草丛生结缕
花艳艳
雨蒙蒙
晓来思绕天涯
南浦魂销
芳草年年有恨
绿遍江南
translation:
Fragrant grass grows in clusters, tying threads
Flowers bright, bright
Rain misty, misty
At dawn, thoughts wind to the edge of the sky
At the southern shore, the soul melts
Fragrant grass, year after year, has resentment
Green covers all Jiangnan
annotation: Bright flowers, misty rain, grass everywhere. But the grass has resentment — it grows every year, and so does her longing.

title: 诉衷情
author: 韦庄
content:
碧沼红芳烟雨静
倚兰桡
垂玉带
交带
动莺语
迎佳期
出兰闺
向柳陌
过花溪
入翠帏
醉且追
又相随
解罗衣
屏帐掩
绣帘垂
低唱笑
含娇姿
translation:
Green pond, red flowers, rain mist quiet
Leaning on the orchid oar
Hanging jade belt
Crossing belts
Moving orioles' words
Welting a good meeting
Emerging from the orchid chamber
Toward the willow path
Crossing the flower stream
Entering the green curtains
Drunk and pursuing
Following again
Untying silk clothes
Screen curtains closing
Embroidered curtains hanging
Low singing, laughing
Containing a charming posture
annotation: A secret meeting by a green pond. Flowers, rain, orchid oars. They meet, they drink, they laugh.韦庄 writes desire with the lightest possible touch.

title: 思帝乡
author: 韦庄
content:
春日游
杏花吹满头
陌上谁家年少
足风流
妾拟将身嫁与
一生休
纵被无情弃
不能羞
translation:
Spring day outing
Peach blossoms blow all over my head
On the road, whose young man
So charming
I plan to marry him
For the rest of my life
Even if he heartlessly abandons me
I won't be ashamed
annotation: A woman sees a charming young man and decides: I'll marry him, even if he leaves me. This is love without conditions — reckless, brave, and completely honest.

title: 上行杯
author: 韦庄
content:
芳草灞陵春岸
柳烟深
满楼弦管
离人辞旧苑
驻马西望肠断
translation:
Fragrant grass, Ba Ling's spring shore
Willow mist deep
The whole tower, strings and pipes
The parting person leaves the old garden
Halts his horse, looks west, heartbroken
annotation: Music plays, willows sway, and someone leaves. He looks west one last time. The shortest farewell can be the most painful.

title: 女冠子
author: 韦庄
content:
昨夜夜半
枕上分明梦见
语多时
依旧桃花面
频低柳叶眉
半羞还半喜
欲去又依依
觉来知是梦
不胜悲
translation:
Last night at midnight
On the pillow, I clearly dreamed
We talked for a long time
Still the same peach-blossom face
Frequently lowering willow-leaf brows
Half bashful, still half happy
About to leave, still reluctant
Waking, I know it was a dream
Can't bear the sorrow
annotation: She dreamed of him. His face, his brows, his voice. Half happy, half shy. Then she woke up. 'Can't bear the sorrow' — the cruelest thing about dreams is waking.

title: 更漏子
author: 温庭筠
content:
玉炉香
红蜡泪
照画堂秋思
眉翠薄
鬓云残
夜长衾枕寒
梧桐树
三更雨
不道离情正苦
一叶叶
一声声
空阶滴到明
translation:
Jade stove incense
Red candle tears
Illuminating the painted hall's autumn thoughts
Eyebrow color thin
Temple clouds broken
Night long, quilt and pillow cold
Phoenix tree
Third watch rain
Not caring that parting feelings are bitter
Leaf by leaf
Drop by drop
On the empty steps, dripping until dawn
annotation: Candles drip, rain falls, the night never ends. 'Dripping until dawn' — the sound of loneliness measured in water drops.温庭筠 is the master of sensory sorrow.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 温庭筠
content:
小山重叠金明灭
鬓云欲度香腮雪
懒起画蛾眉
弄妆梳洗迟
照花前后镜
花面交相映
新帖绣罗襦
双双金鹧鸪
translation:
Small mountains overlap, gold light flickers
Temple clouds about to cross snowy cheeks
Lazily rising to paint moth eyebrows
Playing with makeup, washing slowly
Mirrors front and back reflect the flowers
Flower face and mirror reflect each other
Newly embroidered silk jacket
Pairs of golden partridges
annotation: A woman wakes slowly, puts on makeup, looks in mirrors. Everything is beautiful — her face, her jacket, the paired birds. But 'pairs' reminds her: she's alone.

title: 南歌子
author: 温庭筠
content:
手里金鹦鹉
胸前绣凤凰
偷眼暗形相
不如从嫁与
作鸳鸯
translation:
In her hand, a golden parrot
On her chest, an embroidered phoenix
She secretly sizes him up
Better to marry him
And become a mandarin duck pair
annotation: A woman sees a man and thinks: I should marry him. 'Mandarin duck pair' — the Chinese symbol of lovebirds.温庭筠 writes female desire with refreshing directness.
